title: Cells, Walls, Passages, Boundaries, and Invariants
description: One cell opens east while its neighbor stays closed west, boundary walls disappear, and rendering data becomes the maze source of truth. Learners cumulatively produce reciprocal wall and passage model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Represent north, east, south, and west walls or passage edges with one documented ownership policy.
Carve a passage as one atomic reciprocal update between adjacent cells.
Preserve outer-boundary rules while supporting explicit entrance and exit exceptions.
